label: Snowfall
summary: Falling snow (or hearts, or confetti) on a canvas.
era: The JavaScript snow script every winter homepage installed in December.

classes.name: rs-snowfall
classes.role: the canvas overlay the widget creates

a11y: Decoration: canvas is aria-hidden, pointer-events:none. Never mounts under prefers-reduced-motion; the shared loop pauses when the tab is hidden.
